privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The task.json file is malformed and incomplete (JSON parsing error: unterminated string at description field). The description string itself is incomplete and ends abruptly mid-sentence (terminates with 'as:\n' without specifying report format). Without a valid metadata field, no privileged information claims can be verified for this task.
